untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern identification requires visual pattern recognition (4-point formation geometry, specific support/resistance structure) which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators and crossing operators. The pattern's reversal vs continuation classification and the complex multi-formation analysis (140 total formations with varying performance metrics across 4 sub-formations) require specialized pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to model the breakout confirmation aspect using Donchian channel crosses as a proxy for breakout direction (both directions supported). Entry on breakout (crosses above/below), exit on reversal through opposite channel. However, true Diamond pattern detection requires geometric pattern analysis. Hold period set to 119 days (average days to ultimate high/low from source data). This is a partial approximation only.
